scripts.test: pnpm --dir packages/cli test & pnpm --dir apps/www test & wait
scripts.test:ci: pnpm --dir packages/cli test && pnpm --dir apps/www test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir packages/cli exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --dir apps/www exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.release: pnpm build:registry && pnpm --dir packages/cli build && changeset publish
